title: Specklinia helenae
intro: Specklinia helenae is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the genus Specklinia. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and support overall well-being. Bioactive constituents of Specklinia helenae include flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Specklinia helenae is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its extracts are also used in the production of topical creams and ointments.
